subcodes.first_line: A mention from Our presence unto him who hath quaffed the choice wine of mystic union through revelation and hath turned toward the horizon whence the world was illumined and every created thing gave utterance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن شرب رحیق الوصال الوحی و اقبل الی افق منه انار العالم و نطق کل شیء
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @knowledge; recognition of God
